channel.title: recession indicator on Pascal Michaillat
channel.description: Recent content in recession indicator on Pascal Michaillat

item.title: Has the Recession Started?
item.description: This paper builds the Michez rule, a method to detect US recessions from unemployment and vacancy data. The rule has signaled a recession since March 2024.

item.title: Automated Business Cycle Dashboard
item.description: This webapge hosts an interactive dashboard with real-time charts on US unemployment rate, vacancy rate, labor market tightness, FERU, unemployment gap, recession indicator, and recession probability. Updated daily using FRED data.
